libraries.name: Activity
libraries.description: Provides the base Activity subclass and the relevant hooks to build a composable structure on top.

libraries.name: Experimental annotation
libraries.description: Java annotation for use on unstable Android API surfaces. When used in conjunction with the Experimental annotation lint checks, this annotation provides functional parity with Kotlin's Experimental annotation.

libraries.name: Compose Geometry

libraries.name: Compose Tooling

libraries.description: Compose tooling library data. This library provides data about compose for different tooling purposes.

libraries.name: Compose UI Preview Tooling

libraries.name: Compose Util
libraries.description: Internal Compose utilities used by other modules

libraries.name: Jetpack Compose Libraries BOM
libraries.description: A compatible set of Jetpack Compose libraries.

libraries.name: AndroidX Futures Kotlin Extensions
libraries.description: Kotlin Extensions for Androidx implementation of Guava's ListenableFuture

libraries.name: Core
libraries.description: Provides backward-compatible implementations of Android platform APIs and features.

libraries.name: SplashScreen
libraries.description: This library provides the compatibility APIs for SplashScreen and helper method to enable a splashscreen on devices prior Android 12

libraries.name: androidx.core:core-viewtree
libraries.description: Provides ViewTree extensions packaged for use by other core androidx libraries

libraries.name: Support Custom View
libraries.description: The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later.

libraries.name: androidx.customview:poolingcontainer
libraries.description: Utilities for listening to the lifecycle of containers that manage their child Views' lifecycle, such as RecyclerView

libraries.name: DataStore
libraries.description: Android DataStore - contains the underlying store used by each serialization method along with components that require an Android dependency

libraries.description: Android DataStore Core Okio- contains APIs to use datastore-core in multiplatform via okio

libraries.name: Preferences DataStore Core
libraries.description: Android Preferences DataStore without the Android Dependencies

libraries.name: Support Document File
libraries.description: The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later.

libraries.name: Support DynamicAnimation
libraries.description: Physics-based animation in support library, where the animations are driven by physics force. You can use this Animation library to create smooth and realistic animations.

libraries.name: Emoji2
libraries.description: Core library to enable emoji compatibility in Kitkat and newer devices to avoid the empty emoji characters.

libraries.description: The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later.

libraries.description: The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later.

libraries.description: The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later.

libraries.name: VersionedParcelable
libraries.description: Provides a stable but relatively compact binary serialization format that can be passed across processes or persisted safely.

libraries.name: Support View Pager

libraries.description: WindowManager Jetpack library. Currently only provides additional functionality on foldable devices.

libraries.name: Dagger
libraries.description: A fast dependency injector for Android and Java.

libraries.name: Dagger Lint Rules AAR Distribution
libraries.description: A fast dependency injector for Android and Java.

libraries.name: Hilt Android
libraries.description: A fast dependency injector for Android and Java.

libraries.name: Hilt Core
libraries.description: A fast dependency injector for Android and Java.

libraries.name: error-prone annotations
libraries.description: Error Prone is a static analysis tool for Java that catches common programming mistakes at compile-time.

libraries.name: Guava InternalFutureFailureAccess and InternalFutures
libraries.description:
Contains
    com.google.common.util.concurrent.internal.InternalFutureFailureAccess and
    InternalFutures. Most users will never need to use this artifact. Its
    classes is conceptually a part of Guava, but they're in this separate
    artifact so that Android libraries can use them without pulling in all of
    Guava (just as they can use ListenableFuture by depending on the
    listenablefuture artifact).

libraries.name: Guava: Google Core Libraries for Java
libraries.description:
Guava is a suite of core and expanded libraries that include
    utility classes, Google's collections, I/O classes, and
    much more.

libraries.name: Guava ListenableFuture only
libraries.description:
An empty artifact that Guava depends on to signal that it is providing
    ListenableFuture -- but is also available in a second "version" that
    contains com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture class, without
    any other Guava classes. The idea is:

    - If users want only ListenableFuture, they depend on listenablefuture-1.0.

    - If users want all of Guava, they depend on guava, which, as of Guava
    27.0, depends on
    listenablefuture-9999.0-empty-to-avoid-conflict-with-guava. The 9999.0-...
    version number is enough for some build systems (notably, Gradle) to select
    that empty artifact over the "real" listenablefuture-1.0 -- avoiding a
    conflict with the copy of ListenableFuture in guava itself. If users are
    using an older version of Guava or a build system other than Gradle, they
    may see class conflicts. If so, they can solve them by manually excluding
    the listenablefuture artifact or manually forcing their build systems to
    use 9999.0-....

libraries.name: J2ObjC Annotations
libraries.description:
A set of annotations that provide additional information to the J2ObjC
    translator to modify the result of translation.

libraries.name: AboutLibraries Compose Material 3 Library
libraries.description: AboutLibraries automatically detects all dependencies of a project and collects their information including the license. Optionally visualising it via the provided ui components.

libraries.name: AboutLibraries Core Library
libraries.description: AboutLibraries automatically detects all dependencies of a project and collects their information including the license. Optionally visualising it via the provided ui components.

libraries.name: okhttp-logging-interceptor
libraries.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for Java and Kotlin.

libraries.name: okhttp
libraries.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for Java and Kotlin.

libraries.name: okio
libraries.description: A modern I/O library for Android, Java, and Kotlin Multiplatform.

libraries.name: Converter: Gson
libraries.description: A Retrofit Converter which uses Gson for serialization.

libraries.name: Retrofit
libraries.description: A type-safe HTTP client for Android and Java.

libraries.name: Checker Qual
libraries.description:
checker-qual contains annotations (type qualifiers) that a programmer
writes to specify Java code for type-checking by the Checker Framework.

libraries.name: Parcelize Runtime
libraries.description: Runtime library for the Parcelize compiler plugin

libraries.name: JetBrains Java Annotations
libraries.description: A set of annotations used for code inspection support and code documentation.

libraries.name: JSpecify annotations
libraries.description: An artifact of well-named and well-specified annotations to power static analysis checks
